At the time ofVarahamihira the sidereal (nirayana) and
the tropical (sayana) Zodiacs must have been the same. His
theory appears to work as the Say ana Charts to a large extent.
II. Another theory was propounded by the author of
Uttara Kalamrita. Slokas 5 and 6 of the first Chapter read
thus:

Here three methods are given. The first two refer to the
time ofbirth and the sex of the native. The third determines
the Lagna.
From the time of sunrise (local mean time) to the given
local mean time of birth, note the ghatikas and the Vighatikas
that have elapsed.
